title: `Ashtarowth #6252
definition:
Ashtaroth or Astaroth = "star"

 n pr f deity
 1) false goddesses in the Canaanite religion, usually related to
    fertility cult

 n pr loc
 2) a city in Bashan east of the Jordan given to Manasseh
    2a) same as \\06255\\
